changes.old: we were those things. One went on and on, in an atmosphere of sunshine
changes.new: we are those things. One goes on and on, in an atmosphere of sunshine
changes.reason: Restores the deliberate present tense (siamo noi / si va, si va) that Gemini preserved ("is us"/"goes on and on"); the synthesis flattened both verbs to the past, erasing the intended immediacy.
changes.context_sentence: ength, infinite motion — we are those things. One goes on and on, in an atmosphere of sunshine, and we ran with the win
